meta.title: Iran claims to detect the F-35... and it's likely true
meta.description:
Late last week, Iranian officials drew headlines with their claims of being able to detect and track American F-35s flying over the Persian Gulf, prompting a flood of claims on social media about the $1.7 trillion stealth fighter program no longer offering a strategic edge over the aggressive nation.

Is this claim true? The truth is… It’s pretty likely — but that wouldn’t have the implications many may think it does.
